recommendations.title: Grace Is Gone
recommendations.overview: Upon hearing his wife was killed in the Iraq war, a father takes his two daughters on a road trip, all the while searching for the right time and place to tell them about their mother's fate.

recommendations.title: The Winning Season
recommendations.overview: A comedy centered on a has-been coach who is given a shot at redemption when he's asked to run his local high school's girls basketball team

recommendations.title: The Incredible Jessica James
recommendations.overview: Burned by a bad breakup, a struggling New York City playwright makes an unlikely connection with a divorced app designer she meets on a blind date.

recommendations.title: Love Again
recommendations.overview: Mira Ray, dealing with the loss of her fiancé, John, sends a series of romantic texts to his old cell phone number… not realizing the number was reassigned to Rob Burns' new work phone. Rob, a journalist, is captivated by the honesty in the beautiful

recommendations.title: What We Do in the Shadows
recommendations.overview: Vampire housemates try to cope with the complexities of modern life and show a newly turned hipster some of the perks of being undead.

recommendations.title: The Way He Looks

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: Stuck in Love
recommendations.overview: An acclaimed writer, his ex-wife, and their teenaged children come to terms with the complexities of love in all its forms over the course of one tumultuous year.

recommendations.title: Dedication
